description: User clicks the 'New Tab' button in the browser to open a new page.
frame_description: The user is in a video call session and clicks the plus icon in the browser tab bar.

description: The browser navigates to a new tab page with Google search and shortcuts.
frame_description: A new blank tab opens showing the Google logo and search bar.

description: User hovers the cursor over the Pinterest shortcut icon on the new tab page.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the Pinterest icon in the shortcut grid.

description: User types 'google flights' into the browser's address/search bar.
frame_description: Text 'google flights' appears in the address bar as the user types.

description: An autocomplete dropdown menu appears below the address bar with search suggestions.
frame_description: A list of suggested searches and URLs appears while the user is typing.

description: The page navigates to Google search results for 'google flights'.
frame_description: The search results page loads showing various links related to Google Flights.

description: User hovers over the main 'Google Flights' search result link.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the first organic search result.

description: User clicks on the 'Google Flights' link to open the flight search tool.
frame_description: The user activates the link to navigate to the flights page.

description: The browser navigates to the Google Flights homepage.
frame_description: The Google Flights interface loads with search fields for origin and destination.

description: The Google Flights page finishes loading its interactive UI components and default values.
frame_description: The search form becomes fully visible and interactive.

description: User hovers over the 'Melbourne' origin field.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the pre-filled origin input.

description: User hovers over the AI flight deals banner.
frame_description: The cursor moves over a promotional banner about AI flight discovery.

description: User hovers over the 'Where to?' destination input field for an extended period.
frame_description: The cursor stays over the destination input while the user likely considers their destination.

description: User clicks into the 'Where to?' field to begin entering a destination.
frame_description: The destination input field is focused.

description: A destination selection dropdown menu appears with suggested locations.
frame_description: A list of suggested destinations like 'California' and 'New York' appears.

description: User hovers over 'California, USA' in the destination suggestions.
frame_description: The cursor moves over one of the suggested destination items.

description: User types 'sic' into the destination field.
frame_description: The letters 'sic' are entered into the destination input.

description: The destination suggestions update to show results matching 'sic', including 'Sicily, Italy'.
frame_description: The dropdown list refreshes with new filtered results.

description: User hovers over 'Sicily, Italy' in the filtered suggestions list.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the desired destination in the list.

description: User selects 'Sicily, Italy' from the destination suggestions.
frame_description: The user clicks the Sicily option to set it as the destination.

description: The destination field is updated with 'Sicily' and the dropdown closes.
frame_description: The input field now shows 'Sicily' and the list disappears.

description: User hovers over the destination field after selection.
frame_description: The cursor remains over the updated destination input.

description: User hovers over the 'Departure' date field.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the date selection area.

description: User clicks the 'Round trip' dropdown to change the trip type.
frame_description: The user opens the menu to switch from round trip to one way.

description: A menu appears with trip type options: Round trip, One way, Multi-city.
frame_description: The dropdown menu opens showing the three trip options.

description: User hovers over the 'One way' option in the menu.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the 'One way' selection.

description: User selects 'One way' as the trip type.
frame_description: The user clicks 'One way' to update the search parameters.

description: The UI updates to show 'One way' and removes the 'Return' date input field.
frame_description: The search form layout changes, removing the return date box.

description: User hovers over the 'Melbourne' origin field again.
frame_description: The cursor moves back to the origin input.

description: User clicks the 'Departure' date field to open the calendar.
frame_description: The user activates the date picker.

description: A date picker calendar modal appears on the screen.
frame_description: A calendar showing February and March opens.

description: User hovers over various dates in the February calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves across several date cells in the calendar.

description: User hovers over the 'Next' arrow in the calendar to advance the months.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the right arrow button in the calendar header.

description: User clicks the 'Next' arrow in the calendar.
frame_description: The user advances the calendar view.

description: The calendar view changes to show March and April.
frame_description: The months displayed in the calendar update.

description: User clicks the 'Next' arrow in the calendar again.
frame_description: The user advances the calendar view further.

description: The calendar view changes to show April and May.
frame_description: The months displayed in the calendar update.

description: User clicks the 'Next' arrow in the calendar again.
frame_description: The user advances the calendar view further.

description: The calendar view changes to show May and June.
frame_description: The months displayed in the calendar update.

description: User clicks the 'Next' arrow in the calendar again.
frame_description: The user advances the calendar view further.

description: The calendar view changes to show June and July.
frame_description: The months displayed in the calendar update.

description: User clicks the 'Next' arrow in the calendar again.
frame_description: The user advances the calendar view further.

description: The calendar view changes to show July and August.
frame_description: The months displayed in the calendar update.

description: User clicks the 'Next' arrow in the calendar again.
frame_description: The user advances the calendar view further.

description: The calendar view changes to show August and September.
frame_description: The months displayed in the calendar update.

description: User clicks the 'Next' arrow in the calendar again.
frame_description: The user advances the calendar view further.

description: The calendar view changes to show September and October.
frame_description: The months displayed in the calendar update.

description: User hovers over various dates in October, considering a specific day.
frame_description: The cursor moves over dates in the October calendar view.

description: User selects October 19th as the departure date.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 19th of October in the calendar.

description: The selected date is highlighted in the calendar.
frame_description: A blue circle appears around the selected date.

description: User hovers over the 'Done' button in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the confirmation button in the modal.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm the date selection.
frame_description: The user closes the date picker.

description: The date picker calendar closes and the selected date is shown in the search form.
frame_description: The calendar modal disappears and the main search form is visible again.

description: User hovers over the 'Explore' button.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the primary action button.

description: User clicks the 'Explore' button to search for flights.
frame_description: The user triggers the flight search.

description: The page navigates to the Explore results view.
frame_description: The interface changes to the Explore view with a map and list of destinations.

description: The Explore page shows a loading state (skeleton screens and spinners) while fetching flight data.
frame_description: Placeholder elements are visible while content loads.

description: Flight results and destination markers appear on the map and in the side list.
frame_description: The map populates with price markers and the list shows specific cities in Sicily.

description: User hovers over the map area, looking at destination markers.
frame_description: The cursor moves across the map showing Sicily.

description: User hovers over the 'Palermo' destination card in the results list.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the Palermo entry in the destination list.

description: User hovers over the 'About' link in the page footer for a long duration.
frame_description: The cursor stays near the bottom left of the screen.

description: User clicks on the 'Palermo' destination card to see specific flight options.
frame_description: The user selects Palermo to view more details.

description: A details panel for flights to Palermo opens on the left side of the screen.
frame_description: The destination list is replaced by a panel showing flights to Palermo.

description: The details panel shows a loading state while fetching specific flight schedules and prices.
frame_description: Loading indicators are visible within the Palermo panel.

description: A list of available flights to Palermo appears in the panel.
frame_description: Specific flight options with airlines and prices are displayed.

description: User hovers over the first flight option in the list.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the top flight result.

description: Additional flight options load or expand in the list.
frame_description: The list of flights updates with more choices.

description: User hovers over the 'Turkish Airlines' flight option.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the Turkish Airlines result.

description: User hovers over the 'Prices are currently typical' information box.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the price insight section.

description: User hovers over the 'Turkish Airlines' flight option again.
frame_description: The cursor returns to the Turkish Airlines result.
